title: Writing an Opinion
description: Learning to write opinion pieces with supporting reasons.
subject: Writing

prompts.input: What is your favorite season and why? Give at least two reasons.
hints: Think about what you can do in that season.
How does that season make you feel?

prompts.input: Some people think summer is the best season. Do you agree or disagree? Explain your thinking.
hints: Give reasons to support your opinion.
